Identity.Name: StingDuctMaterials
Identity.Definition: HVAC duct material codes. Drives DW/144 gauge selection, fire performance, embodied carbon, and applicability per StingHVACPressureClasses. Stainless and pre-insulated phenolic are healthcare-pack favourites (theatre supply, MGS-adjacent).

Governance.StandardsBasis: BSRIA DW/144; SMACNA HVAC Duct Construction Standards; HTM 03-01 healthcare ventilation

Value.Definition: Galvanised Steel sheet — Z275 zinc coating per BS EN 10346. Standard HVAC duct material.
Stainless Steel — 304/316. Used for OR theatre supply, kitchen extract, chemical fume.
Aluminium — lightweight, used for fan-coil flexible / rigid plenum boxes.
Pre-insulated Phenolic — sandwich panel ducting, low-leakage, used in healthcare + clean rooms.
Fibreglass Rigid (Lined Duct Board) — limited UK use; common in US light-commercial.
Flexible Aluminium — short connections to terminal devices only.
Insulated Flexible — short low-velocity terminal connections.
Fabric "sock" duct — gymnasiums, large open spaces.
Concrete — fire-shaft ducting, smoke ventilation shafts.
